text: The sleek glass walls and modern design of the entryway evoke a sense of anticipation within me; I feel like I am on the threshold of discovery. Stepping inside, the vibrant R+D exhibit instantly stimulates my curiosity. Words about innovation and the merging of technology with humanity leave me thoughtful, wondering how our creations might reshape our understanding of ourselves. Yet, amongst the celebration of progress, there is a quiet tension—a sense that every leap forward brings new questions, and the boundary between what is human and what is artificial keeps shifting. Here, I feel both inspired and unsettled, alive to the possibilities and the responsibilities innovation entails.
